creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wxs         2010-05-29 21:18:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net/freeradius2      Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    net/freeradius2/files pkg-deinstall.in pkg-install.in 
  Log:
  Update to 2.1.9
  Use USE_GMAKE instead of RUN_DEPENDS
  Use ${FILESDIR} for EXTRA_PATCHES
  Use USERS and GROUPS and simply pkg-install.in and update pkg-message to
  reflect these new changes.
  
  PR:             ports/147188
  Submitted by:   Ryan Steinmetz <rpsfa@rit.edu> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.86      +13 -33    ports/net/freeradius2/Makefile
  1.31      +3 -3      ports/net/freeradius2/distinfo
  1.2       +5 -5      ports/net/freeradius2/files/pkg-deinstall.in
  1.6       +3 -86     ports/net/freeradius2/files/pkg-install.in
  1.42      +2 -0      ports/net/freeradius2/pkg-plist
